arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney releases statement after being sacked for second time in a year
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has seen his Plymouth tenure ended after just a matter of months with the two parties mutually parting with the Pilgrims currently bottom of the Championship

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney leaves Plymouth Argyle 'by mutual agreement'
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle announce that they have 'mutually parted ways' with head coach Wayne Rooney after their recent poor form in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney sacked by Plymouth Argyle after nightmare run of results
arts.sum: The Manchester United legend has left Home Park following a torrid run of results

arts.ttl: 3 managers Plymouth Argyle must consider ASAP after Wayne Rooney exit confirmation
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle are on the lookout for a new boss after confirming Wayne Rooney’s departure following a dismal… The post 3 managers Plymouth Argyle must consider ASAP after Wayne Rooney exit confirmation appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha banned for two games and fined after Ipswich melee
arts.sum: Brazilian pushed Ipswich security guard in the face Wolves forward to miss Forest and Bristol City games The Wolves forward Matheus Cunha has been suspended for two games and fined £80,000 following a melee after the Premier League game against Ipswich this month. The hugely influential Cunha will now miss games against Nottingham Forest in the league and the FA Cup tie against Bristol City. The forward was charged with misconduct and it was alleged that he acted in an improper manner after the final whistle. He admitted the charge and the sanctions were subsequently imposed by an independent regulatory commission. Full written reasons for this case will be published in due course. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney leaves second job in a year with Plymouth bottom of Championship
arts.sum: After being sacked by Birmingham in January, the former Manchester United star has struggled to inspire the Pilgrims this season, with the club four points from safety

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney leaves Plymouth by mutual consent after seven months
arts.sum: Former England forward took over in May Plymouth are bottom of Championship after 23 games Wayne Rooney and Plymouth Argyle have “mutually agreed to part ways with immediate effect”, the club have announced. The 39-year-old was appointed in May and leaves with the club sat bottom of the Championship, four points from safety. Argyle are bottom of the Championship after 23 games and most recently lost 2-0 to fellow strugglers Oxford and 4-0 to Coventry. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney's first words as Man United icon sacked by Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: The legendary striker has paid the price with the Pilgrims bottom of the EFL Championship

arts.ttl: Rooney leaves Plymouth role after dismal run
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle have parted company with Wayne Rooney following the side's defeat to Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney dismissed by Plymouth Argyle after horrendous run of form
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Wayne Rooney was only appointed as Plymouth boss at the start of the season but he has already been sacked after just one win in 15 Championship games
